name: Cheese Balls #2 (Baked)
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375°F.
2 Grate the cheese.
3 Melt the butter; mix the cheese and melted butter.
4 Add the flour and salt, mixing well.
5 Pinch off a small amount of dough. Place one date half and one pecan half in the center of the pinched dough, then wrap the dough around them to form a ball.
6 Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
